subcodes.first_line: O radiant candle in the gathering of divine certitude! O my God, this is a star that hath risen from the horizon of steadfastness to Thy Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع روشن در محفل ثبوت الهی الهی هذا نجم بزغ من افق الثبوت علی میثاقک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @teaching the Cause; call to teach
